suppress.notes: False positive: angus-activation is a separate project from angus-mail with independent versioning. CVE-2025-7962 affects angus-mail (SMTP component) only, not angus-activation (Jakarta Activation). See https://github.com/dependency-check/DependencyCheck/issues/8130
CVE-2026-54515 affects com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind 2.22.0 (directly declared). No patched release is available yet. Suppress until a fixed version is published.
